nodes.label: Prestige Group Logo (src/assets)
nodes.description: Prestige Group brand logo featuring a golden eagle inside a dark circular emblem with the tagline 'Add Prestige to your life'. Likely a duplicate of root-level download.png, bundled as a React asset for in-app use.
nodes.visual_style: Dark circular badge, gold eagle mascot, serif wordmark
nodes.intended_use: App logo/branding asset imported by React components
